title: Senior Financial Analyst - SIDBI Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - SIDBI Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
SIDBI Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Gwalior. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About SIDBI Ventures Solutions:
SIDBI Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SIDBI Ventures Solutions!
